name: Tip Jar
description: A simple tip jar contract on Arbitrum Stylus.
cargoToml:
[package]
name = "tip-jar"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"

[dependencies]
stylus-sdk = "0.6.0"
alloy-primitives = "0.7"
alloy-sol-types = "0.7"

[dev-dependencies]
tokio = { version = "1", features = ["full"] }

[features]
export-abi = ["stylus-sdk/export-abi"]

[lib]
crate-type = ["lib", "cdylib"]

uiSchema.title: Tip Jar
uiSchema.description: A simple tip jar contract on Arbitrum Stylus.

children.content: This contract allows anyone to send tips to the contract owner. The owner can withdraw the accumulated tips.
Initialize the contract, setting the deployer as the owner.
Send ETH to the contract as a tip.
Withdraw all accumulated tips to the owner's address. Only the owner can call this function.
